name: 11ai-aws-operations
description: Modular, safety-first skills for common AWS CLI operations and troubleshooting.

interface.shortDescription: Run common AWS tasks safely and clearly.
interface.longDescription: A modular AWS CLI toolbox for inspecting account context, operating S3, EC2, Lambda, ECS, ECR, CloudWatch, IAM, and CloudFormation, answering command questions, and troubleshooting failures from evidence before proposing changes.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use the 11ai-aws-operations skills for this AWS task.
